summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RH EPI module including CBO search, EPI consultation, dashboard, and funcionários. All 17 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI flow for CBO search and EPI loading verified working correctly with Gemini AI integration.

minor.issue: Returns 400 Bad Request - appears to be a missing or incomplete endpoint

critical_code_review_comments: CBO_DATABASE contains ~30 occupations with predefined EPIs - working correctly
Gemini AI integration (gemini-2.5-flash) is properly configured for unknown CBOs
EPI_PROPERTIES mapping provides CA, validade_meses, prioridade, and risco for each EPI type
Fallback mechanism works when AI fails - returns generic EPIs
Minor: /api/tasks/unread-count endpoint returns 400 for system=rh parameter
seed_data_creation: No new test data created - used existing funcionários (João Silva x2)
context_for_next_testing_agent: RH EPI module fully tested and working. CBO search endpoint /api/rh/epi/cbo/buscar returns occupations from local CBO_DATABASE. EPI consultation endpoint /api/rh/epi/consultar-epis-cbo returns EPIs from local database for known CBOs or uses Gemini AI (gemini-2.5-flash) for unknown CBOs. Frontend EPI page flow: Open modal → Search CBO → Select occupation → Click 'Carregar EPIs' → View Mapa de Risco and EPIs list. Dashboard shows 2 funcionários, R$ 7.000,00 folha mensal.

gemini_integration.usage: Used for unknown CBO codes not in local CBO_DATABASE
